Atuba Vhief Varkees:
Do you want an audience with Pa'agrio Lord Katai? I don't think it possible. Pa'agrio Lord does not meet with just anyone.
Also, he is not here at the moment. The great Kakai is recovering far away. But don't you dare think that he fled before the Kasha Orcs!
The health was troubling him long before they appeared. But I believe that soon comes the day when we'll see him in all his glory once again!
